lines.speaker: Mark
lines.text: Have you seen my keys? I've checked every pocket.
lines.taggedText: [long pause] Have you seen my keys? I've checked every pocket.

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.taggedText: [long pause] [amused] Did you check the freezer?

lines.speaker: Mark
lines.text: Why would they be in the freezer?
lines.taggedText: [long pause] [confused] Why would they be in the freezer?

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.text: Last Tuesday. You put them down when you grabbed ice cream.
lines.taggedText: [long pause] Last Tuesday. You put them down when you grabbed ice cream.

lines.speaker: Mark
lines.text: They're in there. Don't tell anyone.
lines.taggedText: [long pause] [gasps] They're in there. [embarrassed] Don't tell anyone.

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.text: Too late, I already texted your mum.
lines.taggedText: [long pause] [laughing] Too late, I already texted your mum. [long pause]
